name: Cheesey Turkey Cottage Fries
recipeIngredient: 3 cups frozen cottage-style potatoes (up to 4 cups)
2 cups frozen cut broccoli, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the inside of a Crock-Pot with cooking spray.
2. Place the potatoes in a single layer in the bottom of the Crock-Pot.
3. Stir together the remaining ingredients (cheese product, turkey, pimiento, and broccoli).
4. Pour the mixture over the potatoes.
5. Cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
Serves 4 (1 cup servings)
